g.text: How architecture compliance maps to milestones
installed on all developer machines. CI scan running
on every PR. Baseline exceptions registered.
Q4-2026: Compliance rules extended to cover D2 components
Agent hierarchy checks enforced (L3 -> L4 transition).
D3 no-domain agent boundaries added to spec.
Q1-2027: Full compliance enforcement across all D2/D3 agent
code. CRAG threshold checks active. DRRI metric
definition locked in spec. Exception registry audited.
Q2-2027: Domain agent compliance (domain-specific check types
registered per domain). CRAG auto-tuning results feed
back into spec thresholds. Clean exception registry
Deviation found -> Fix code | Update spec+PUML | Register exception
Expired exception -> Fix code or renew with approval
New capability -> Update spec first, then implement
